caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio, set within a clothing store. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The man is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in a podcast. The background includes framed photographs on the wall, a mannequin dressed in a white shirt, and racks of clothes, indicating the setting is a retail space. The atmosphere seems casual and relaxed, with the man appearing engaged in conversation or narration. The logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" are visible, reinforcing the context of a podcast recording.
